'''Nemlix''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of ''[[Vigiliance]]'', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] that formed part of the [[Corrupter Task Force]]. He was assigned to locate the [[Defiance Task Force]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
